options.name: -a
options.description: Listen on all network interfaces, not just localhost

options.name: -d
options.description: Use USB device (error if multiple devices connected)

options.name: -e
options.description: Use TCP/IP device (error if multiple TCP/IP devices available)

options.name: -s
options.description: Use device with given serial (overrides $ANDROID_SERIAL)

options.name: -t
options.description: Use device with given transport id

options.name: -H
options.description: Name of adb server host [default=localhost]

options.name: -P
options.description: Port of adb server [default=5037]

options.name: -L
options.description: Listen on given socket for adb server [default=tcp:localhost:5037]

options.name: -l
options.description: Long output

subcommands.name: remount
subcommands.description: Remount partitions read-write. if a reboot is required, -R will automatically reboot the device

options.name: -R
options.description: Reboot device

subcommands.name: jdwp
subcommands.description: List pids of processes hosting a JDWP transport

subcommands.name: sideload
subcommands.description: Sideload the given full OTA package

subcommands.name: start-server
subcommands.description: Ensure that there is a server running

subcommands.name: kill-server
subcommands.description: Kill the server if it is running

subcommands.name: reconnect
subcommands.description: Kick connection from host side to force reconnect

subcommands.name: device
subcommands.description: Kick connection from device side to force reconnect

subcommands.name: offline
subcommands.description: Reset offline/unauthorized devices to force reconnect`

subcommands.name: tcpip
subcommands.description: Restart adbd listening on TCP on PORT

subcommands.name: reboot
subcommands.description: Reboot the device; defaults to booting system image but supports bootloader and recovery too. sideload reboots into recovery and automatically starts sideload mode, sideload-auto-reboot is the same but reboots after sideloading

subcommands.name: disable-verity
subcommands.description: Disable dm-verity checking on userdebug builds

subcommands.name: enable-verity
subcommands.description: Re-enable dm-verity checking on userdebug builds

subcommands.name: keygen
subcommands.description: Generate adb public/private key; private key stored in FILE

subcommands.name: connect
subcommands.description: Connect to a device via TCP/IP [default port=5555]

subcommands.name: disconnect
subcommands.description: Disconnect from given TCP/IP device [default port=5555], or all

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Remove this app package from the device

options.name: -k
options.description: Keep the data and cache directories

subcommands.name: pair
subcommands.description: Pair with a device for secure TCP/IP communication

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Push a single package to the device and install it

options.name: -l
options.description: Forward-lock the app

options.name: -r
options.description: Replace existing application

options.name: -t
options.description: Allow test packages

options.name: -d
options.description: Allow version code downgrade (debuggable packages only)

options.name: -s
options.description: Install on SD card instead of internal storage

options.name: -g
options.description: Grant all runtime permissions

options.name: --abi
options.description: Override platform's default ABI

options.name: --instant
options.description: Cause the app to be installed as an ephemeral install app

options.name: --no-streaming
options.description: Always push APK to device and invoke Package Manager as separate steps

options.name: --streaming
options.description: Force streaming APK directly into Package Manager

options.name: --fastdeploy
options.description: Use fast deploy

options.name: --no-fastdeploy
options.description: Prevent use of fast deploy

options.name: --force-agent
options.description: Force update of deployment agent when using fast deploy

options.name: --date-check-agent
options.description: Update deployment agent when local version is newer and using fast deploy

options.name: --version-check-agent
options.description: Update deployment agent when local version has different version code and using fast deploy

options.name: --local-agent
options.description: Locate agent files from local source build (instead of SDK location)

subcommands.name: shell
subcommands.description: Run remote shell command (interactive shell if no command given)

options.name: -e
options.description: Choose escape character, or `none` default '~'

options.name: -n
options.description: Don't read from stdin

options.name: -T
options.description: Disable pty allocation

options.name: -t
options.description: Allocate a pty if on a tty

options.name: -tt
options.description: -tt: force pty allocation

options.name: -x
options.description: Disable remote exit codes and stdout/stderr separation

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Check if mdns discovery is available

options.name: --sync
options.description: Only push files that are newer on the host than the device

options.name: -n
options.description: Dry run: push files to device without storing to the filesystem

options.name: -z
options.description: Enable compression with a specified algorithm (any, none, brotli)

options.name: -Z
options.description: Disable compression

subcommands.name: sync
subcommands.description: Sync a local build from $ANDROID_PRODUCT_OUT to the device (default all)

options.name: -n
options.description: Dry run: push files to device without storing to the filesystem

options.name: -l
options.description: List files that would be copied, but don't copy them

options.name: -z
options.description: Enable compression with a specified algorithm (any, none, brotli)

options.name: -Z
options.description: Disable compression

options.name: -a
options.description: Preserve file timestamp and mode

options.name: -z
options.description: Enable compression with a specified algorithm (any, none, brotli)

options.name: -Z
options.description: Disable compression

options.name: --list
options.description: List all forward socket connections

options.name: --remove
options.description: Remove specific forward socket connection

options.name: --remove-all
options.description: Remove all forward socket connections

options.name: --no-rebind
options.description: Reversal fails if the specified socket is already bound through a previous reverse command

options.name: --list
options.description: List all reverse socket connections from device

options.name: --remove
options.description: Remove specific reverse socket connection

options.name: --remove-all
options.description: Remove all reverse socket connections from device

options.name: --no-rebind
options.description: Reversal fails if the specified socket is already bound through a previous reverse command
